intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant Cacabus maritimus. However, I found information on Cakile maritima, also known as Sea Rocket. Here's a paragraph about it:

Cakile maritima, or Sea Rocket, is a coastal annual plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Cakile maritima include isothiocyanates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Cakile maritima include teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and wounds.
